chunks.title: Completion of Building Projects
chunks.reason: Describes the completion of Solomon's building work and settlement of cities.

chunks.title: Forced Laborers and Officials
chunks.reason: Catalogs the foreign laborers used and lists the chief deputies of Solomon.

chunks.title: Temple Worship Organization
chunks.reason: Narrates the moving of Pharaoh's daughter and the establishment of priestly duties.

chunks.title: Naval Expedition to Ophir
chunks.reason: Records Solomon's journey to Ezion-geber and the return of gold from Ophir.
